Africa South Airspace Rules

CPDLC

  • CPDLC should be made available through TopSky with Logon Code AFRS.

Separation

FIR Airspace Separation Rule Remarks
GOOO - Lateral 10 NM -
- Longitudinal 20 NM -
- Vertical RVSM -
Outside of UTA/TMA Lateral 15 NM -
- Longitudinal 15 MIN -
- Vertical ICAO Cruise Levels -
Oceanic Lateral 15 NM -
- Longitudinal 15 MIN except EUR-SAM and AORRA
- Vertical ICAO Cruise Levels -
GQNN - Lateral 10 NM -
- Longitudinal 20 NM -
- Vertical RVSVM -

SELCAL

FIR SELCAL Remarks
DIII Yes -
DGAC Yes -
DNKK No -
FCCC No -
GLRB No -
GQNN No -
GOOO Yes includes Oceanic
GVSC Yes -

SLOP

FIR SLOP Remarks
DGAC Yes SLOP applied in AORRA airspace and Ghana airspace between FL290 and FL410
DNKK Yes FL290-FL410 on all enroute ATS routes
FCCC Yes -
GLRB Yes FL290-FL410
GOOO Yes includes Oceanic
GVSC Yes -

AFRS Africa South | v0.1
